title: Decision Log
summary: Architectural and design decision log (D001-D009) capturing locked technical choices for the Pokemon Champions Companion MVP from 2026-04-10 onward.
scope: shared types between Python and TypeScript
notes: Manifest declared ADR; document is a multi-decision log where each Dxxx entry follows Context/Decision/Rationale ADR structure. All entries stated as final decisions (no Proposed/Draft markers), so treated as Accepted/locked per orchestrator instruction to treat decisions as authoritative.
